memberdef.name: SHELL_TELNET_DEFINE
memberdef.initializer: static struct shell_telnet _name##_shell_telnet; \ struct shell_transport _name = { \ .api = &shell_telnet_transport_api, \ .ctx = (struct shell_telnet *)&_name##_shell_telnet \ }

briefdescription.para: This function provides pointer to shell telnet backend instance.

detaileddescription.para: Function returns pointer to the shell telnet instance. This instance can be next used with shell_execute_cmd function in order to test commands behavior.
